name: CECH
description: Precision measurement services in Michigan including high-accuracy calibration, verification for lab instruments and industrial systems.[10]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Both techs were extremely friendly to work with and gave GREAT service. First-rate class act.
I truly appreciate you guys jumping through hoops to get them here.
Can be trusted to be complete without any hiccups.
They were efficient, great at trouble-shooting and answered any questions presented.

sentiment.summary: CECH Corp receives consistently exceptional reviews across all testimonials, with clients praising their professional, friendly technicians who deliver thorough, efficient service with reliability and strong communication.

name: Controls Service, Inc.
description: ISO/IEC 17025 accredited calibration and repair for wide array of controls instrumentation through A2LA.[7]

name: Fox Valley Metrology
description: ISO/IEC 17025 accredited calibration lab providing precision measuring instrument calibration services to Michigan and surrounding areas, including dimensional, electrical, and mechanical equipment.[1][5]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: FVM is our go to shop for mostly all of our measuring and testing equipment!
The customer service has been very good. Thank you for all that you do!
FVM worked with me through all the ups and downs, and made the transition much easier!
FVM has done a great job handling items that stretch your team above the norm

sentiment.summary: Fox Valley Metrology receives consistently excellent reviews for exceptional customer service, reliable calibration expertise, and willingness to solve difficult technical challenges for industrial clients.

name: Incal Tech
description: ISO 17025 accredited hand tool calibration services for micrometers, calipers; fast turnarounds and onsite service in Michigan.[9]
